Cosine similarity between two vectors is: dot(a,b) / (|a| * |b|). Compute this for each user pair.
For predicting a rating, only use users with positive similarity who have actually rated that item (rating > 0).
The predicted rating is a weighted average: sum(similarity[u] * rating[u][item]) / sum(similarity[u]).
Sort predictions by score descending, break ties by item index ascending, then take the top N.
